text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, new trainers and veterans alike have
gathered to listen to each other's performance
reports. I've learned quite a lot from the event,
but...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Looks like you'll be sharing your progress in the
next meeting! I'm excited to see how you've been
doing!
choice_data_list: (I have to do a good job!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I do my best to put together an insightful
presentation...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spend the next few days preparing, but the
information I've gathered seems nowhere near as
useful as what the veteran trainers presented.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Are you doing all right? You look super
worried about something...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I see. So you're worried about not doing well in
your presentation...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
In that case, I've got just the thing that'll chase all
your worries away!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
All you gotta do is get started on some
strength training!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Let's start you off with some dumbbell lifts! Here,
try this twenty-kilogram one!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't see how strength training will help my
presentation, but since she seems pretty
concerned about me, I decide to give it a try.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I get ready to lift the dumbbell, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Really?! Sorry, I should've picked a lighter weight
to start with.
choice_data_list: I don't think this is going to work...
I don't think this is going to work...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
It's okay! From what I can tell, your deltoids still
have massive room for growth!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Let's try again, but with five kilograms this time!
Trust in your delts!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For the remainder of the day, I focus on training
my deltoids by pumping the five-kilo dumbbells.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
All right! Today, let's move up to ten-kilogram
weights! Listen, can you hear your biceps saying,
"We can do this"?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And just like that, the weight of my dumbbells
increases day by day.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Those pecs are looking good! I think you can
finally move up to twenty kilos! You can lift
fifteen kilos no problem now—you've got this!
choice_data_list: Yeah, I think I can do this!
Yeah, I think I can do this!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
That's the spirit! All right, go ahead and lift them
up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Amazingly, the twenty-kilo dumbbells that didn't
even budge when I tried lifting them before rise
ever so slightly in the air!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: You did it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: That's right! You really did it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
There's nothing you can't do as long as you keep
building yourself up diligently!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The moment she says that, I suddenly realize that
if I just work on my performance report slowly and
steadily, then maybe, just maybe...
choice_data_list:
I'll work on my performance report the same
way—steadily and without rushing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: There it is! You said it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Anything is possible as long as you stick to it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You know, that's why I suggested working out in
the first place. I was hoping it'd help you realize
that for yourself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, best of luck on your presentation! I'll be
cheering you on!
